20.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

20.gl: Hades or the world of the dead (as if a subterranean retreat), including its accessories and inmates

20.dv: the same as H9 (אֲבֵדָה), miswritten for H11 (אֲבַדּוֹן);

21.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
21.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
21.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

21.gl: the mouth (as the means of blowing), whether literal or figurative (particularly speech); specifically edge, portion or side; adverbially (with preposition) according to
21.kj: accord(-ing as, -ing to), after, appointment, assent, collar, command(-ment), [idiom] eat, edge, end, entry, [phrase] file, hole, [idiom] in, mind, mouth, part, portion, [idiom] (s

21.gl: gold, figuratively, something gold-colored (i.e. yellow), as oil, a clear sky
21.dv: from an unused root meaning to shimmer;

21.gl: a pot or furnace (as if excavated)
21.dv: from an unused root meaning properly, to dig through;

21.gl: silver (from its pale color); by implication, money

22.gl: a bisection, i.e. (by implication) the centre
22.kj: among(-st), [idiom] between, half, [idiom] (there-, where-), in(-to), middle, mid(-night), midst (among), [idiom] out (of), [idiom] through, [idiom] with(-in).
22.dv: from an unused root meaning to sever;

22.gl: a mortar; by analogy, a socket (of a tooth)

22.dv: from an unused root (meaning to be perverse);

23.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
23.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
23.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

23.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
23.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

23.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
23.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

23.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
23.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

23.gl: to place (in a very wide application)
23.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

24.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
24.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

24.gl: properly, something set apart, i.e. (abstractly) dedication (of a priet or Nazirite); hence (concretely) unshorn locks; also (by implication) a chaplet (especially of royalty)
properly, a revolution of time, i.e. an age or generation; also a dwelling

25.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
25.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a

25.gl: to denude (especially in a disgraceful sense); by implication, to exile (captives being usually stripped); figuratively, to reveal
25.kj: [phrase] advertise, appear, bewray, bring, (carry, lead, go) captive (into captivity), depart, disclose, discover, exile, be gone, open, [idiom] plainly, publish, remove, reveal, [

25.gl: to gather for any purpose; hence, to receive, take away, i.e. remove (destroy, leave behind, put up, restore, etc.)
25.kj: assemble, bring, consume, destroy, felch, gather (in, together, up again), [idiom] generally, get (him), lose, put all together, receive, recover (another from leprosy), (be) rerew

25.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

25.dv: perhaps originally the same as H2681 (חָצִיר), from the greenness of a courtyard;
from an unused root meaning to glisten (or be green);

26.gl: a garment (literally or figuratively); by implication (euphemistically) a wife
26.kj: apparel, clothed with, clothing, garment, raiment, vestment, vesture.

26.gl: prepared, i.e. full grown; spoken only (in plural) of he-goats, or (figuratively) leaders of the people

26.kj: country, field, ground, land, soil, [idiom] wild.
26.dv: or שָׂדַי; from an unused root meaning to spread out;
from an unused root meaning to buy;

26.gl: a ram (just old enough to butt)
26.dv: from an unused root meaning to dominate;

27.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
27.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

27.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
27.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

27.gl: enough (as noun or adverb), used chiefly with preposition in phrases
27.kj: able, according to, after (ability), among, as (oft as), (more than) enough, from, in, since, (much as is) sufficient(-ly), too much, very, when.

27.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
27.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
27.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

27.gl: a she-goat (as strong), but masculine in plural (which also is used elliptically for goat's hair)
